ai_analysis.investment_summary: This property is a prime capital appreciation and value-add play for patient investors. The significant discount to the market median provides a substantial margin of safety. While the October 2026 tenancy restricts immediate cash-flow optimization or end-user occupancy, the served legal notice secures a clear path to vacant possession in the medium term. An investor can acquire this asset at a low cost basis, collect holding income for two years, and subsequently renovate the unit to sell or re-rent at a premium, capitalizing on the localized price lift generated by the completion of the neighboring Como Residences.

ai_analysis.quality_context: The Signature (DAMAC Maison Mall Street) is a high-end serviced hotel-apartment development. At 1,372 sqft, this 2-bedroom unit offers a significantly larger layout than newer Downtown Dubai handovers, which typically average 1,000 to 1,200 sqft. The property is fully furnished to hotel standards and offered vacant, allowing for immediate occupancy or rental placement. While DAMAC Maison provides premium hospitality amenities (spa, valet, concierge, pool), the build quality and aesthetic are tailored to a hospitality-focused product rather than a traditional residential tower.
risk_flags: High Service Charges: Serviced apartments under the DAMAC Maison brand carry significantly higher service charges (often 30-50% higher than standard residential towers in Downtown), which will heavily compress net rental yields.

Developer Discount: DAMAC properties in Downtown historically trade at a discount compared to Emaar-developed master communities due to secondary market preferences and historical maintenance standards.

Traffic Congestion: Located directly on Mall Street, the immediate vicinity suffers from severe traffic bottlenecks during peak hours, weekends, and Dubai Mall events, impacting resident accessibility.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: Priced at AED 1,749 per sqft, this property trades at a massive 32.4% discount to the Downtown Dubai market median of AED 2,587 per sqft. This low entry point offers strong downside protection and capital appreciation potential. Given its 'Vacant Now' status, turnkey furnished condition, and immediate proximity to Dubai Mall, the optimal investment strategy is short-term holiday home rentals, which can absorb the high service charges and generate double-digit gross yields. It represents an undervalued asset for cash-flow-focused investors willing to manage serviced-apartment operational costs.

ai_analysis.quality_context: The property is located in Yas Park Gate, a highly desirable gated community by Aldar on Yas Island, Abu Dhabi. Featuring premium plot attributes—'Single Row', 'Corner Unit', and the 'Biggest Plot'—this townhouse offers superior privacy, better natural light, and enhanced outdoor space compared to standard units in the master development. Yas Island is a prime investment zone known for high capital appreciation, world-class leisure amenities, and strong rental demand from high-income expatriates.
risk_flags: Pricing Anomaly: The listed price of AED 1,072/sqft is 45.5% below the market median of AED 1,969/sqft. This suggests the 3,731 sqft figure likely represents the total Plot Area rather than the Built-Up Area (BUA). If BUA is significantly smaller, the actual price per BUA sqft may be at or above market luxury standards.

Geographic Jurisdiction: While analyzed by a Dubai-focused lens, Yas Island is subject to Abu Dhabi Municipality (ADM) regulations and Aldar transfer guidelines, which differ slightly from Dubai's DLD frameworks.

Off-Plan/Handover Status: Yas Park Gate is a recently launched development; investors must verify construction milestones, payment plan transferability, and exact handover timelines to manage cash flow risks.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: On paper, this unit presents a highly lucrative investment opportunity, trading at a massive 45% discount to the market median per sqft while boasting premium 'Single Row' and 'Corner' positioning. These unique selling points (USPs) typically command a 10-15% premium in the secondary market. If the pricing is verified against actual Built-Up Area (BUA) and holds true, this represents an arbitrage opportunity with high capital appreciation potential and projected net yields exceeding 7.5% upon completion, driven by Yas Island's robust tourism and residential expansion.

ai_analysis.quality_context: Located in Jumeirah Village Triangle (JVT), a mature and highly sought-after family community in Dubai. This property is an independent 'Middle Arabian' style villa featuring a massive 6,684 sqft plot (exceptionally large for a 2-bedroom layout), which has been fully upgraded and extended. The independent villa status, combined with a maid's room and upgraded interiors, positions it in the premium tier of JVT's secondary market.
risk_flags: Plot vs. BUA Discrepancy: The 6,684 sqft figure likely represents the plot size rather than the Built-Up Area (BUA). If the AED 965/sqft rate is calculated on plot size, the actual price per BUA sqft is significantly higher, which may distort the perceived discount against the market median.

Extension Legality: The villa is advertised as 'Extended'. Investors must verify that all structural modifications have official NOCs from the developer (Nakheel) and approvals from Dubai Municipality, and are fully registered on the Title Deed.
Age and MEP Integrity: JVT is an established community; cosmetic upgrades can sometimes mask underlying aging MEP (mechanical, electrical, plumbing) infrastructure.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: Priced at AED 965/sqft against a market median of AED 1,497/sqft, this property offers an apparent 35.5% discount, presenting a highly compelling value proposition on paper. The combination of a massive plot, independent villa structure, and completed upgrades offers strong capital appreciation potential and premium rental yield prospects. However, final investment viability hinges on verifying whether the price-per-sqft metric is calculated on BUA or plot size, and ensuring all structural extensions are fully legalized.

title: Hot Deal Marina Heights | High ROI | 2 Parking
description:
Betterhomes is proud to present this outstanding investment opportunity in the heart of Dubai Marina, located in the well-established Marina Heights.

This unit stands out as one of the best-priced properties currently available in the building, making it a rare find for investors seeking immediate returns and long-term value appreciation.

The property is tenanted, ensuring instant rental income from day one, and offers a strong ROI, making it an ideal addition to any investment portfolio.

What truly sets this unit apart is the inclusion of two dedicated parking spaces — a highly sought-after feature in Dubai Marina that significantly enhances both rental demand and resale value.

Property Features:

* Tenanted unit – immediate income
* The lowest-priced units in the market
* Two allocated parking spaces
* Spacious layout with excellent potential
* Located in a prime marina community

Residents of Marina Heights enjoy access to a range of amenities.

ai_analysis.quality_context: Marina Heights is an established, mid-tier residential tower completed in 2006, located in the high-demand northern district of Dubai Marina. At 1,287 sqft, this 2-bedroom unit offers a highly generous layout compared to modern, more compact layouts. Priced at AED 1,546 per sqft, the property sits at a massive ~32% discount to the Dubai Marina market median of AED 2,278 per sqft. This pricing gap is primarily driven by the building's age and older aesthetic, but it represents an excellent entry point for value-seeking investors. The inclusion of two allocated parking spaces is a highly lucrative differentiator, as most 2-bedroom units in this micro-market only allocate one.
risk_flags: Building Age & CapEx: Completed in 2006, the building may require higher maintenance fees, and the unit itself may need significant capital expenditure (renovation) to command premium market rents.

RERA Rental Cap Limitations: Being sold 'tenanted' guarantees immediate cash flow, but the current rent is likely locked below current market rates due to RERA rental index restrictions, limiting immediate yield optimization.
Slower Capital Appreciation: Older towers in Dubai Marina typically experience slower capital growth compared to newer, premium waterfront developments in the same area.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: This property is a classic 'value-add' defensive play. The steep 32% discount to the market median provides a strong safety margin and downside protection. While the building's age limits rapid capital appreciation, the combination of immediate rental income, a spacious layout, and the rare asset of two parking spaces ensures high rental liquidity and strong net yields. This is a highly recommended buy for income-focused investors looking to secure stable, above-average ROI in a prime, high-occupancy location, with the long-term option to renovate and flip for capital gains upon tenant exit.

description:
DOM9 Properties is pleased to present this beautifully appointed 1-bedroom apartment in Park Towers B, DIFC, offering a compelling opportunity for both end users and savvy investors seeking long-term value in Dubai’s most prestigious financial district.

Spanning 881 sq. ft., this well-proportioned residence features a generous open-plan layout designed to maximize space, functionality, and natural light. Floor-to-ceiling windows frame attractive skyline views, creating a bright and inviting living environment ideal for modern urban living. The apartment is complemented by a fully fitted kitchen with appliances, built-in wardrobes, and high-quality finishes throughout, all maintained in excellent condition.

Located in the heart of DIFC — the leading financial center of Dubai and a globally recognized business hub — this property benefits from consistent demand driven by multinational corporations, financial institutions, and senior executives. title: DEC Tower 2 | 6.75% Net ROI | Marina Views
description:
Betterhomes is proud to present this well maintained one bedroom apartment in the iconic DEC Tower 2, ideally situated in the heart of Dubai Marina.
Property Details

Size: 823 sq ft
Asking Price: AED 1,050,000
Current Rent: AED 80,000 per annum
Service Charges: AED 11 per sq ft (AED 9,053 per annum)
Gross ROI: 7.6%
Net ROI: 6.75%

About the Property
This spacious and bright apartment offers a functional layout with generous living space, a well-appointed kitchen, and a comfortable bedroom with ample storage. The unit enjoys beautiful views and is currently tenanted, making it an ideal ready investment for discerning buyers.
About DEC Tower 2
DEC Tower 2 is a well-established residential development in Dubai Marina, one of the most sought-after waterfront communities in Dubai. Residents enjoy direct access to the Marina Walk, an array of dining and retail options, and seamless connectivity to the rest of the city via Sheikh Zayed Road and the Dubai Metro.
Key Highlights

Prime Dubai Marina location
Currently tenanted at AED 80,000 per annum
Gross ROI of 7.6% and Net ROI of 6.75%
Strong rental demand in the area
Access to world-class amenities
Easy access to Sheikh Zayed Road and Metro

Contact us at Betterhomes for any inquiries and to arrange viewings.

ai_analysis.quality_context: DEC Tower 2 is an established, mid-tier residential development completed in 2009. While it lacks the premium finishes and luxury status of high-end Emaar or Select Group developments in Dubai Marina, it offers highly functional layouts and a strategic location near the southern end of the Marina, close to the metro and JBR. The property's price per sqft of AED 1,276 is a massive 32.3% discount compared to the Dubai Marina market median of AED 1,884, reflecting its older age and secondary-grade classification.
risk_flags: Building Age & Maintenance: Completed in 2009, the building may face higher wear-and-tear, potentially leading to rising maintenance costs or future special levies for capital improvements.
Lower Capital Appreciation Potential: Mid-to-low tier buildings in Dubai Marina historically experience slower capital growth compared to premium, modern waterfront developments.

RERA Rental Cap Limitations: The unit is currently tenanted at AED 80,000. Increasing the rent to current market rates will be restricted by the RERA rental index, limiting immediate yield optimization.
Secondary Location: Situated at the far end of Dubai Marina, which, while highly accessible, is generally considered less premium than the central Marina or Marina Phase 1 areas.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: This property represents an exceptional high-yield, entry-level investment opportunity in Dubai Marina. With a net ROI of 6.75% (well above the Marina average of 5-5.5%) and a low service charge of AED 11/sqft, it is highly optimized for cash flow. The significant discount to the market median price per sqft provides a strong safety margin. It is highly recommended for yield-focused investors seeking stable, immediate rental income rather than aggressive capital appreciation.

ai_analysis.quality_context: The property is a spacious 1-bedroom apartment (875 sqft, which is above the JVC average of 700-800 sqft) offered at AED 937 per sqft. This represents a massive 34.5% discount compared to the JVC market median of AED 1,432 per sqft. Being vacant, ready to move in, and situated on a high floor with good natural light makes it highly attractive for immediate leasing or end-use. However, the steep discount suggests the building may belong to an older, lower-tier developer, as premium new-builds in JVC currently drive the higher market median.
risk_flags: Significant underpricing relative to the market median may indicate underlying building quality issues, poor maintenance, or active litigation within the homeowners' association.
Potential for high outstanding service charges owed by the current owner which must be cleared before transfer.

The JVC market median of AED 1,432/sqft is heavily skewed by premium off-plan and recently handed-over projects; legacy secondary market properties in JVC typically trade lower, meaning the actual 'like-for-like' discount may be narrower than 34.5%.
Older buildings in JVC often suffer from chiller system inefficiencies or high district cooling fees, which can negatively impact net rental yields.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: At an implied purchase price of approximately AED 820,000, this property presents a highly lucrative value-add or high-yield buy-to-let opportunity. Given its vacant status and generous size, it can be immediately rented out. Assuming a conservative market rent of AED 65,000 to 75,000 per annum for a large 1-bed in JVC, the investor can expect a strong gross rental yield of 7.9% to 9.1%. If physical due diligence clears the building of major structural or maintenance issues, this is an immediate 'buy' for yield-seeking investors looking for a low entry point in a high-demand rental hub.

If the listing is genuine, purchasing a fully furnished 845 sqft 1-bed at this price point in JVC offers an estimated gross rental yield of 8.5% to 9.5%, well above the Dubai average. The massive discount to the market median provides a strong margin of safety and excellent potential for capital appreciation, making it a highly recommended 'Buy' subject to rigorous physical inspection and title deed verification.

title: MODERN 2 BEDROOM | CANAL AND BURJ KHALIFA VIEW
raw_area: Artistry One Residences, Dubai Design District, Dubai
description:
Step into a refined residential experience at Artistry One Residences, a boutique development by Select Group located in the heart of Dubai Design District.

This well-planned 2-bedroom residence spans approximately 1,698 sqft offering an efficient and comfortable layout ideal for both end-users and investors. The apartment features a bright living and dining area, a contemporary open kitchen, and two well-proportioned bedrooms with built-in wardrobes, providing privacy and functionality for everyday living.

Large windows and a private outdoor space enhance the sense of openness while allowing natural light to flow throughout the home. The layout is practical yet refined, making it suitable for professionals, couples, or small families seeking a modern city residence in a premium district.

Finishes are thoughtfully selected to reflect understated luxury, including high-quality flooring, elegant bathroom fittings, and a sleek kitchen fitted with premium appliances. Clean lines and neutral tones create a timeless interior that can be easily styled to suit personal taste.

Residents benefit from a curated collection of lifestyle and wellness amenities, including an elegant lobby with concierge services, residents’ lounges, landscaped outdoor spaces, children’s play areas, and horizon pools set on elevated decks. Wellness facilities include a fully equipped gym, outdoor fitness zones, spa areas with sauna and steam rooms, and sun decks designed for relaxation.

Situated in Dubai Design District, the residence enjoys excellent connectivity to Downtown Dubai, DIFC, Business Bay, Dubai Mall, and major road networks. Surrounded by waterfront promenades, cultural venues, cafés, and creative spaces, D3 continues to attract strong rental demand and long-term value.

Total Area: 1,698 sqft 

Price: AED 4,975,000

Interested in this apartment or want to learn more? Get in touch today to explore ownership and investment opportunities at Artistry One Residences.

raw_area: DEC Tower 1, DEC Towers, Dubai Marina, Dubai
description:
Brought to you by Xestate Properties LLC, this spacious 2 bedroom apartment is located in DEC Tower 1, Dubai Marina, offering a prime location and a vibrant waterfront lifestyle.

Situated on a high floor, the apartment features a bright and spacious layout with stunning city views, making it an ideal home for both end-users and investors.

Property Details:

  * 2 Bedrooms
  * 3 Bathrooms
  * Built-up Area: 1,490 sq. ft.
  * High Floor
  * Full Marina View
  * Fully Furnished
  * Kitchen Appliances Included
  * 1 Parking Space
  * Vacant On Transfer

The apartment offers a generously sized living and dining area, spacious bedrooms with built-in wardrobes, an equipped kitchen, and floor to ceiling windows that allow plenty of natural light throughout the unit.

DEC Tower 1 is a well established residential tower in Dubai Marina, known for its convenient access to Sheikh Zayed Road, Marina Walk, JBR Beach, restaurants, supermarkets, and retail outlets.

Building Amenities:

  * Swimming Pool
  * Fully Equipped Gym
  * Sauna and Steam Room
  * 24/7 Security
  * Covered Parking
  * Children’s Play Area
  * High-Speed Elevators
  * Concierge and Lobby Area

This property is an excellent choice for buyers looking for a spacious apartment in one of Dubai’s most sought-after communities.

About Dubai Marina:
﻿
Dubai Marina is one of Dubai’s most vibrant waterfront communities, known for its iconic skyline, luxury lifestyle, and lively atmosphere. The area offers a perfect mix of residential, retail, dining, and leisure destinations, with easy access to the beach, marina promenade, and public transport including the Metro and Tram. Residents enjoy a dynamic urban lifestyle surrounded by cafés, restaurants, shopping outlets, and world-class amenities, making it a highly sought-after destination for both end-users and investors.

For more information or to schedule a viewing, please contact Xestate Properties LLC.

raw_area: Kamoon 1, Kamoon, Old Town, Downtown Dubai, Dubai
description:
Property Highlights:

- Built-Up Area: 1,234 sq. ft.
- 2 Bedrooms, 3 Bathrooms
- Fully Furnished
- Ready to Move In
- Bright Layout

Community and Lifestyle Amenities:

- Outdoor swimming pool
- Fully equipped gymnasium
- Spa with steam room, sauna and Jacuzzi
- Squash courts
- Landscaped gardens
- Children's playground
- Barbecue area
- 24-hour security and concierge
- Underground parking
- Pet-friendly building

Location and Connectivity:

Kamoon 1 is nestled within Old Town, a characterful Arabian-style enclave at the heart of Downtown Dubai. The building sits steps from Souk Al Bahar and within easy reach of the Burj Khalifa, the Dubai Fountain, Dubai Opera, and The Dubai Mall  one of the world's largest retail and dining destinations. Sheikh Mohammed bin Rashid Boulevard offers an outstanding array of luxury retail outlets, fine-dining restaurants, and trendy cafes, while Spinneys and Carrefour Market provide everyday convenience close by.

Downtown Dubai offers excellent connectivity via direct access to Sheikh Zayed Road (E11) and Financial Centre Road (D71), linking residents seamlessly to Business Bay, DIFC, and beyond. The Burj Khalifa/Dubai Mall Metro Station on the Red Line is easily accessible, and the community's pedestrian-friendly streets make walking a pleasure.

For more details or to arrange a viewing, please contact James Federer.

Limestone House is strategically located in the heart of the Dubai International Financial Center. Direct access to the DIFC gate avenue affords residents the convenience and connectivity to enjoy all that DIFC has to offer. The building is popular with the working professionals in the area, who are within walking distance of their offices. The building also benefits from direct access to the Ritz Carlton hotel, which includes several restaurants and coffee shops. Residents also benefit from a discount scheme for the hotel. Limestone House excludes grandeur and privacy, where, as a resident you will experience direct access to your property from a single use lift.

DIFC offers the opportunity to experience city living at its finest. Remarkable apartments appeal to those who are seeking the highest quality of life. DIFC is home to some of Dubai’s finest restaurants and bars, including La Petite Maison, Zuma, Josette and The Guild, along with the prestigious Arts Club to name but a few. Premium office and retail space in DIFC - including the high-profile ICD Brookfield Place - has attracted top tier luxury hotels such as the Four Seasons and Ritz Carlton. DIFC is the paradigm of convenience and connectivity, offering exciting new amenities including the unique Emirates Airline city check-in.

title: 3 BEDROOM | PRIME D3 LOCATION | MAID'S ROOM
raw_area: Artistry One Residences, Dubai Design District, Dubai
description:
Experience elevated waterfront living at Artistry One Residences, a boutique residential address by Select Group in the heart of Dubai Design District (D3). Defined by sculptural architecture and refined interiors, this exclusive tower offers a sophisticated lifestyle framed by iconic city landmarks and tranquil canal surroundings.

This expansive 3-bedroom residence spans approximately 1,988  offering a beautifully proportioned layout designed for comfort, privacy, and entertaining. The home features a generous living and dining area, a contemporary open kitchen, and three well-sized bedrooms with built-in wardrobes, making it ideal for families or discerning end-users seeking space in a prime location.

Large windows and private outdoor areas frame canal and Burj Khalifa views, creating a striking backdrop that enhances both daily living and long-term investment appeal. 
The kitchen is fitted with high-quality appliances and sleek cabinetry, while bathrooms feature elegant fittings and refined materials. 

Residents enjoy access to a curated selection of lifestyle and wellness amenities, including an elegant lobby with concierge services, residents’ lounges, landscaped outdoor spaces, children’s play areas, and horizon pools set on elevated decks. Wellness facilities include a fully equipped gym, outdoor fitness areas, spa amenities with sauna and steam rooms, and sun decks designed for relaxation and wellbeing.

Located in Dubai Design District, the residence benefits from exceptional connectivity to Downtown Dubai, DIFC, Business Bay, Dubai Mall, and major road networks. Surrounded by cultural venues, waterfront promenades, and creative spaces, D3 continues to attract strong end-user demand and long-term value.

Total Area: Approx. 1,988 

View: Canal & Burj Khalifa

Price: AED 6,069,000

Interested in this residence or want to learn more? Get in touch today to explore ownership and investment opportunities at Artistry One Residences.

raw_area: Artistry One Residences, Dubai Design District, Dubai
description:
Discover refined urban living at Artistry One Residences, an elegant residential address developed by Select Group in the heart of Dubai Design District (D3). Designed as a sculptural expression of light, space, and proportion.

This thoughtfully designed 1-bedroom residence spans approximately 764  featuring a balanced layout that blends comfort with functionality. The apartment offers a well-proportioned living and dining area, a modern open kitchen, and a generously sized bedroom with built-in wardrobes. Large windows and a private outdoor space enhance the sense of openness, allowing natural light to flow throughout the home.

Finishes are carefully curated to reflect understated luxury, with porcelain tile flooring, refined bathroom fittings, and a contemporary kitchen fitted with premium appliances.

Residents of Artistry One enjoy access to a comprehensive selection of lifestyle and wellness amenities. These include an elegant lobby with concierge services, residents’ lounges, landscaped outdoor spaces, children’s play areas, and horizon pools positioned on elevated decks. A fully equipped gym, outdoor fitness zones, spa facilities with sauna and steam rooms, and sun decks provide a complete living experience focused on balance and wellbeing.

Located in Dubai Design District, the project benefits from excellent connectivity to key destinations including Downtown Dubai, DIFC, Dubai Mall, Business Bay, and major road networks. The district is known for its vibrant atmosphere, waterfront promenades, cultural venues, and proximity to leading business and lifestyle hubs, making it a highly desirable address for both residents and investors.

title: Large 1BR Layout | Unfurnished | Exclusive
description:
Discover upscale urban living in this spacious 1 bedroom apartment in Building 9, City Walk. Spanning an impressive 1,336 sq.ft, this unfurnished unit offers a rare combination of generous space, modern design, and a peaceful community setting ideal for both end users and investors.

The apartment features a bright and airy open plan living and dining area, enhanced by floor to ceiling windows that invite plenty of natural light. The layout flows seamlessly onto a large private balcony, perfect for relaxing or entertaining while enjoying tranquil views of the beautifully landscaped amenities and community spaces.

The bedroom is well sized with built in wardrobes, while the kitchen is designed with functionality in mind, ready to be customized to your personal taste. The overall layout provides flexibility to create a stylish home tailored to your lifestyle.

Located in the heart of City Walk, one of Dubai’s most vibrant and sought after destinations, residents enjoy premium facilities including swimming pools, fitness centers, landscaped areas, and 24/7 security. With world-class retail, dining, and entertainment options just steps away, this property offers the perfect balance between lively city life and serene living.

Limestone House is strategically located in the heart of the Dubai International Financial Center. Direct access to the DIFC gate avenue affords residents the convenience and connectivity to enjoy all that DIFC has to offer. The building is popular with the working professionals in the area, who are within walking distance of their offices. The building also benefits from direct access to the Ritz Carlton hotel, which includes several restaurants and coffee shops. Residents also benefit from a discount scheme for the hotel. Limestone House excludes grandeur and privacy, where, as a resident you will experience direct access to your property from a single use lift.

DIFC offers the opportunity to experience city living at its finest. Remarkable apartments appeal to those who are seeking the highest quality of life. DIFC is home to some of Dubai’s finest restaurants and bars, including La Petite Maison, Zuma, Josette and The Guild, along with the prestigious Arts Club to name but a few. Premium office and retail space in DIFC - including the high-profile ICD Brookfield Place - has attracted top tier luxury hotels such as the Four Seasons and Ritz Carlton. DIFC is the paradigm of convenience and connectivity, offering exciting new amenities including the unique Emirates Airline city check-in.

Location and Connectivity:

Burj Crown by Emaar sits on Sheikh Mohammed bin Rashid Boulevard, placing residents at the very centre of Downtown Dubai. The Dubai Mall, Burj Khalifa, Dubai Fountain, Souk Al Bahar, and Dubai Opera are all within easy reach, offering world-class dining, retail, entertainment, and cultural experiences on the doorstep. The vibrant boulevard itself is lined with boutique stores, cafes, and restaurants ideal for everyday leisure.

Connectivity is seamless, with direct access to Sheikh Zayed Road and Financial Centre Road linking residents to Business Bay, DIFC, and beyond. The Burj Khalifa/Dubai Mall Metro Station on the Red Line is close by, and the pedestrian-friendly boulevard makes walking a genuine daily pleasure.

For more details or to arrange a viewing, please contact James Antony Federer.

, this elegant 1-bedroom apartment in Marina Views at Rashid Yachts & Marina offers a rare opportunity to own a premium waterfront residence

Spanning 742.38 sq.ft, the apartment is thoughtfully designed with contemporary interiors, spacious living areas, and floor-to-ceiling windows that maximize natural light and create a seamless connection to the vibrant marina surroundings. Marina Views forms part of the iconic Rashid Yachts & Marina master development, where Riviera-inspired elegance meets Dubai’s dynamic urban lifestyle. Residents will enjoy a wide range of premium amenities including swimming pools, fitness facilities, waterfront relaxation areas, and easy access to Dubai’s key landmarks. Perfectly positioned, the development offers excellent connectivity with Downtown Dubai just 10 minutes away and Dubai International Airport reachable within 15 minutes.

title: ULTRA LUXURY 1 BEDROOM | SEA VIEWS | 50/50 PP
raw_area: Lia by Avenew, Dubai Islands, Dubai
description:
Discover refined waterfront living with this elegant 1-bedroom apartment in LIA by Avenew, located in the heart of Dubai Islands, where the serenity of the Arabian Gulf meets the vibrancy of a contemporary marina. Designed with balance, light, and functionality in mind, this residence reflects a modern coastal lifestyle shaped by nature and architectural precision.

The apartment offers a total area of 831 sq. ft. with a well-proportioned layout featuring an open-plan living and dining area seamlessly connected to a modern kitchen. The bedroom is complemented by a walk-in closet and an en-suite master bathroom, while a separate powder room and dedicated laundry space enhance everyday convenience. Floor-to-ceiling windows allow natural light to flow throughout, opening onto a private balcony ideal for relaxation.

LIA is a boutique G+8 residential building comprising only 81 exclusive residences, crafted with flowing architectural lines, tiered balconies, and lush greenery. Residents enjoy world-class amenities including a podium-level infinity pool, pool bar, fully equipped gym, lounge deck, BBQ areas, kids’ play zone, and a grand triple-height lobby designed as a serene arrival experience.

Strategically positioned, Dubai Islands offers a unique balance of tranquility and accessibility, with easy connections to Downtown Dubai, Dubai International Airport, retail, dining, and leisure destinations.

Price: AED 2,000,000

description:
Apartment for sale in Creek Horizon Tower 1, Creek Horizon

Betterhomes is proud to present this 1 Bedroom Apartment located in Creek Horizon Tower 1, Creek Horizon, Dubai Creek Harbour (The Lagoons).

Unit Details:

* Rented 
* Park View
* Kitchen: Open
* Bathrooms: 1
* Built up Area: 752.50 square feet

* Balcony
* Sea/Water view
* Security
* Intercom
* Concierge Service
* Conference room
* Public parking
* Prayer Room
* Shared Gym
* Pets Allowed
* Childrens play area

Dubai Creek is the cornerstone of Dubai’s heritage. Located next to Ras Al Khor wildlife sanctuary, a home to an abundance of native flora and fauna.

Creek Horizon Tower 1 sits at the heart of Creek Island, centrally positioned adjacent to the community's Central Park and overlooking the district's marina. Dubai Creek Harbour is a master-planned waterfront community by Emaar, offering a 6km harbour promenade lined with cafs, art installations, and dining venues, alongside the Dubai Creek Marina. The Ras Al Khor Wildlife Sanctuary, famous for its flamingos and tranquil lagoons, is just moments away, offering a rare natural escape within the city.

The community connects seamlessly to the wider city via Ras Al Khor Road (E44), placing Downtown Dubai and Business Bay approximately 15 minutes away. Dubai International Airport is also easily accessible, and a planned Dubai Metro expansion will further enhance public transport links.

title: Exclusive | Ultra Luxury | Smart Home
description:
Welcome to a residence where innovation meets exceptional design. This truly one-of-a-kind 3-bedroom apartment with an additional private guest suite has been completely reimagined, setting a new benchmark for luxury living in Dubai.

At its core is a sculpted natural stone kitchen designed for direct cooking—eliminating the need for conventional stovetops. A bespoke 360-degree rotating ceiling-mounted TV, finished in matching stone, reflects the seamless design language throughout. Everyday features such as the sink, flush, and storage elements are discreetly integrated into stone surfaces, revealing themselves only when needed—creating a clean, minimalist aesthetic with cutting-edge functionality.

Located in the prestigious Tiara Aquamarine tower on Palm Jumeirah, the apartment has undergone a full high-end transformation. Ambient lighting, premium finishes, and carefully curated furnishings create a refined yet welcoming atmosphere. The former maid’s room has been converted into a stylish fourth bedroom with its own en-suite, ideal as a guest suite.

Floor-to-ceiling windows and a spacious balcony showcase breathtaking views of Atlantis, Royal Atlantis, the harbour, and the Arabian Gulf.

Fully furnished, vacant, and move-in ready, the home includes two parking spaces.

Contact Leo Blomquist today to arrange your private viewing.

Armada Tower 3 is situated in the lively JLT conveniently placed within close proximity of key landmarks in Dubai such as Dubai Marina, The Palm and JBR Beach. JLT offers a range of benefits to residents such as a wide range of restaurants, transport links and directly off Sheikh Zayed Road. Also a high-rise building in Jumeirah Lake Towers, a mixed-use development best known for its beautiful man-made lakes and manicured gardens. The residential building is a part of the Armada Towers complex and is located in Cluster P, JLT.

Tower 3 developed by Armada Group has 36 floors above ground and three floors below ground along with retail options on the ground level. The residential building stands 493 sq. ft. tall. The high-rise is designed by Adnan Saffarini. Its construction started in 2005 and was completed in 2009.

description:
Step into beautifully designed 1-bedroom apartment in La Sirene, vacant on transfer and ready for immediate Move-In. 
This stylish home blends modern design with comfort and premium finishes.  Perfect for investors or those seeking a serene seaside lifestyle.

Why this apartment in La Sirene:

•	Prime location in a sought-after beachfront community
•	Close to dining, leisure, and retail destinations

Key Features:

•	Bespoke Interior and ready to move in

•	Spacious bedroom with built-in storage
•	Stunning seaside views and tranquil surroundings

Enjoy the perfect balance of luxury, convenience, and coastal living in one of Dubai’s most prestigious communities. A rare opportunity to secure a high-value property in a prime location.

La Sirene  is part of the Port de La Mer development in Jumeirah, combining low-rise waterfront buildings with landscaped communal areas. Residents benefit from access to a marina-side promenade, outdoor seating zones, and walking paths. The wider community includes retail, cafés, and waterfront dining options, along with convenient access to main roads connecting to key parts of Dubai. The setting is suitable for both end-users and investors seeking a residential apartment in a well-established coastal district.

raw_area: SAAS Hills, Dubai Science Park, Dubai
description:
Discover elevated living at SAAS Hills, an architectural sanctuary by SAAS Properties where wellness, design, and serenity converge. Nestled within the natural topography of Dubai’s hillside terrain, this visionary project offers a lifestyle defined by privacy, balance, and sophisticated modernity.

This rare 2-bedroom apartment, is one of the most spacious layouts in the entire community, offering a total area of 2,142 Sqft — perfect for al fresco dining, relaxation, or hosting. 

Project Vision and Design
SAAS Hills was conceived with a singular purpose: to create a living experience rooted in wellness, architectural elegance, and timeless aesthetics. The facade features layered design elements that mirror the natural hillside, while interiors draw from a soft palette of textured stone, warm wood, and diffused light to promote calm and clarity. Vertical gardens and landscaped courtyards enhance the connection to nature throughout the property.

Community Amenities

Infinity-edge pool with skyline views

Rooftop fitness areas and yoga decks

Outdoor cinema and shaded BBQ terraces

Zen lounges, gardens, and walking paths

Concierge service, valet parking, and 24/7 security

Dedicated wellness areas for residents of all ages

Shaded children’s play areas and lush communal spaces

Location and Connectivity
Positioned in a fast-growing green district with excellent road connectivity and future metro access, SAAS Hills ensures effortless access to central Dubai while offering a peaceful retreat from the urban pace.

Payment Plans Available : 40/60

Price: AED AED 3,035,281
Unit Type: 2 Bedrooms
Total Area: 2,142 Sqft

This is more than a residence—it’s a lifestyle of refinement and quiet luxury, tailored for those who seek space, nature, and architectural distinction.

description:
This beautifully maintained 2-bedroom apartment in the highly sought-after Goldcrest Views 1 is now vacant and ready to move in immediately. Perfectly positioned in the heart of Jumeirah Lakes Towers, this home offers a fantastic balance of comfort, functionality, and modern living.

•	Vacant Now
•	Vastu Compliant
•	Maids Room with Shower
•	2 En-Suite Bedrooms
•	Open plan Kitchen Living Area
•	Access to balcony from all rooms
•	High Floor
•	Park / Community Views
•	1 Covered Parking

The apartment features two generous en-suite bedrooms, both with direct access to balconies, allowing you to enjoy beautiful views and fresh air from every room. A dedicated maid’s room adds excellent practicality for family or professional living. The thoughtfully designed open kitchen flows seamlessly into the living and dining area, creating a bright and sociable space ideal for entertaining or everyday family life. The entire layout is Vastu compliant, promoting positive energy and harmony throughout the home.

With balconies accessible from all rooms, you’ll love the sense of openness and connection to the outdoors. Goldcrest Views 1 offers residents premium facilities and a prime location with easy access to Sheikh Zayed Road, metro stations, lakeside promenades, and an abundance of restaurants, supermarkets, and amenities.

This is a rare opportunity to own a well-planned, move-in ready home in one of JLT’s most popular towers.

description:
Spacious 1-Bedroom | Fully Furnished | High Floor | Stunning Golf & Canal Views

Discover elevated living in one of Dubai Sports City’s most prestigious residential towers. This exceptionally spacious 1-bedroom apartment offers a rare combination of size, comfort, and breathtaking views, making it an ideal home or investment opportunity.

Situated on a high floor, the apartment features expansive interiors with a well-designed layout, abundant natural light, and premium furnishings throughout. Floor-to-ceiling windows frame spectacular panoramic views of the lush golf course and tranquil canal, creating a serene setting above the city. The apartment has been thoughtfully upgraded and is fully furnished with quality appliances including a fridge,TV and microwave, making it completely move-in ready. Floor-to-ceiling windows frame spectacular panoramic views of the lush golf course and tranquil canal, creating a serene setting above the city.

Property Highlights:

Huge 1-bedroom apartment with generous living spaces
Fully furnished and move-in ready
Size-1164 sqft
High-floor unit with uninterrupted golf course and canal views
Bright open-plan living and dining area
Modern kitchen with quality fittings and appliances
Spacious bedroom with built-in wardrobes
Located in one of the premium towers in Dubai Sports City
Excellent amenities including pool, gym, dry Sauna,Steam Room,new Jacuzzi,24/7 security, and covered parking

Perfect for end-users seeking a refined lifestyle or investors looking for a high-demand property in a thriving community. Enjoy the convenience of nearby retail, dining, sports facilities, and easy access to major highways.

A rare opportunity to own a standout apartment in one of Dubai Sports City’s most sought-after addresses.

Belgravia Square is an Ellington Properties development nestled within Jumeirah Village Circle, one of Dubai's most sought-after family-friendly communities. Developed by Nakheel, JVC is home to over 30 landscaped parks, jogging and cycling tracks, sports courts, and a vibrant selection of cafes, restaurants, and supermarkets. Circle Mall, the community's main retail hub, places everyday conveniences within easy reach.

Strategically positioned between Al Khail Road and Sheikh Mohammed Bin Zayed Road, JVC offers seamless connectivity to Dubai Marina, Downtown Dubai, Dubai Media City, and Dubai Internet City. The building's location in District 14 places residents close to several reputable schools and healthcare facilities, making it an ideal home for professionals and families alike.

For more details or to arrange a viewing, please contact Hunter Steele Newman.

description:
Betterhomes is delighted to offer you this luxurious One Bedroom Apartment for sale in prestigious Sparkle Tower 3, Dubai Marina. 

One of Dubai Marina's most iconic residential developments, Sparkle Towers is a twin-tower complex created in partnership with renowned Austrian crystal brand Swarovski and completed in 2020. The towers are connected by a podium and feature a stunning façade illuminated by over 1,700 lights and adorned with Swarovski crystal accents, creating a brilliant, jewel-like glow at night. 

Residents enjoy an impressive selection of amenities, including a fully equipped fitness center, spa, temperature-controlled swimming pools, separate saunas and Jacuzzis for men and women, and an exclusive residents' lounge. Ideally located along Marina Walk, Sparkle Towers offers easy access to the beach, Dubai Metro, and a variety of waterfront dining and leisure destinations.

It features three luxury residential towers (Al Meera, Noora and Amna) and three luxury five-star hotels (The St. Regis, The W and The Westin) operated by Starwood Hotels & Resorts. Noura is one of three towers comprising 'The Residence Collection' with very high-class apartments overlooking the canal, horse stables and sea.

description:
Where London prestige meets Dubai’s waterfront brilliance — welcome to Chelsea Residences by DAMAC, an exclusive collection of branded homes inspired by the legacy of Chelsea F.C. and the elegance of coastal living.

This expansive 2-bedroom residence, covering 1,610 sqft, offers a masterfully crafted layout with refined interiors, sweeping sea views, and a seamless flow between indoor comfort and outdoor serenity. Designed for those who demand excellence, every corner of this home reflects premium craftsmanship, curated aesthetics, and a branded lifestyle unlike any other in the city.

Key Features:
• Grand 2-bedroom layout with premium fittings and finishes
• Open-plan living and dining spaces with floor-to-ceiling windows
• Designer kitchen, spa-style bathrooms, and generous storage
• Starting from AED 4,575,000

Signature Wellness & Lifestyle Amenities:
• Rooftop Stamford Pitch & Football Simulation Room

raw_area: Soulever by Beyond Tower 1, Soulever by Beyond, Maritime City, Dubai
description:
Soulever by Beyond rises as Dubai Maritime City’s newest architectural landmark—two sculptural towers shaped by the sea, designed with precision, and infused with tranquility. Developed by Beyond Developments under the Omniyat Group, Soulever reflects Dubai’s maritime heritage through fluid forms, warm natural textures, and panoramic views of the Forest, the Cove, and the vibrant city skyline.

This 1-bedroom residence spans 855  offering a refined and efficient layout that blends living, dining, and balcony spaces with effortless flow. Floor-to-ceiling windows draw in natural light, opening your home to serene Forest and Cove views. Thoughtfully crafted interiors, a stylish powder room, and elevated ceiling heights create a sense of openness and calm—perfect for modern urban living.

Residents enjoy a suite of world-class amenities, including a heated infinity pool overlooking the sea, a cutting-edge fitness center, yoga and wellness studios, spa facilities, a private library, residents lounge, event and co-working spaces, a dedicated kids’ area, and a lush landscaped podium with cafés and boutique retail.

Just 5 minutes from Mina Rashid and 15 minutes from Downtown Dubai, Soulever offers the ideal blend of waterfront serenity and city convenience—an exceptional lifestyle destination and a prime investment opportunity.

Price: AED 2,800,000
Size: 855 
View: Forest / Cove
Developer: Beyond Developments (Omniyat Group)

Interested in this 1-bedroom residence or exploring other units in Soulever? Reach out today for exclusive availability and investment insights in Dubai Maritime City.

This stunning mixed-use building is one of the most popular residential buildings in DIFC. Each property benefits from having a balcony from which you can enjoy either the serenity of Zabeel, or the epitome of city living, overlooking the DIFC. Burj Daman boasts hotel worthy amenities, with a stunning outdoor swimming pool, squash court and top of the range gymnasium. The complex is connected to the Daman office tower and the superb Waldorf Astoria hotel.

DIFC offers the opportunity to experience city living at its finest. Remarkable apartments appeal to those who are seeking the highest quality of life. DIFC is home to some of Dubai’s finest restaurants and bars, including La Petite Maison, Zuma, Josette and The Guild, along with the prestigious Arts Club to name but a few. Premium office and retail space in DIFC - including the high-profile ICD Brookfield Place - has attracted top tier luxury hotels such as the Four Seasons and Ritz Carlton. DIFC is the paradigm of convenience and connectivity, offering exciting new amenities including the unique Emirates Airline city check-in.

title: LOWEST PRICE UNIT | WATERFRONT | ULTRA LUXURY
raw_area: Soulever by Beyond Tower 1, Soulever by Beyond, Maritime City, Dubai
description:
Where coastal calm meets urban pulse.
Soulever by Beyond is Dubai Maritime City’s new architectural icon – two sculptural towers rising above the sea, blending natural serenity with refined design. Developed by Beyond Developments under Omniyat Group, Soulever captures Dubai’s maritime legacy through elegant architecture and breathtaking panoramas of the Cove, the Forest, and the city skyline.

This 2-bedroom residence spans 1,469 and offers a graceful layout connecting living, dining, and balcony spaces in harmony. Expansive windows flood the interiors with daylight and soothing marina views. The home features a powder room, refined finishes, and generous ceiling heights that create an airy sense of calm – perfect for both leisure and family life.

Residents enjoy access to world-class amenities, including a heated infinity pool, state-of-the-art gym, yoga and wellness areas, spa, library, residents lounge, event space, kids play area, and a beautifully landscaped podium park with cafés and retail avenues.

Perfectly positioned just 5 minutes from Mina Rashid and 15 minutes from Downtown Dubai, Soulever offers the perfect balance between vibrant city life and tranquil beachfront living.

Price: AED 5,311,000
Size: 1469 sqft 
View: Ocean Cove 
Developer: Beyond Developments (Omniyat Group)

Interested in this 2-bedroom or want to explore other Soulever residences? Get in touch today to discover exclusive investment opportunities in Dubai Maritime City.

title: 40|60 PROMO | SEA VIEW | BEACHFRONT | ULTRA LUXURY
raw_area: Avita, Passo by Beyond, Palm Jumeirah, Dubai
description:
Experience a new dimension of coastal luxury in this exquisitely designed 1-bedroom residence at Passo by Beyond, set on the prestigious Crescent of Palm Jumeirah — one of Dubai’s most iconic and sought-after addresses. This 877 home is a masterclass in refined beachfront living, blending sculptural architecture, timeless interiors, and uninterrupted views of the Arabian Gulf and Dubai’s glittering skyline.

Step into a flowing open-plan layout where high ceilings and expansive glazing fill every corner with natural light, blurring the line between indoors and out. The living and dining area extends seamlessly to a private terrace, offering the perfect setting for morning coffee with sea breezes or evening sunsets over the water. The gourmet kitchen is crafted with sophisticated finishes, integrated appliances, and elegant stone worktops, making it as functional as it is beautiful.

The primary bedroom is a serene retreat, featuring soft textures, bespoke wardrobes, and spa-inspired ensuite bathroom adorned with refined stone finishes and warm neutral tones. A separate powder room, laundry space, and intuitive storage solutions complete the thoughtful design, ensuring both elegance and practicality.

Residents of Passo enjoy private beach access, a 40m-wide white sand shoreline, resort-style pools, wellness pavilions, landscaped social decks, and curated spaces for leisure, work, and connection — all managed with the privacy and exclusivity of a high-end residential community.

Just minutes from Atlantis The Royal, Nakheel Mall, and Dubai Marina, and within easy reach of Downtown Dubai and both airports, Passo offers an unmatched location that balances island tranquility with city convenience.

Price: AED 4,146,000 | Size: 877
Your chance to own an address that needs no introduction — an exclusive residence where every day feels like a five-star escape.

title: Perfect Investment | High Floor | Vacant
description:
Betterhomes is pleased to offer you this stunning One Bedroom apartment located in the Marina Gate Tower 2 by Select Group, Dubai Marina. 

Perfectly positioned at the entrance of Dubai Marina, Marina Gate 2 offers direct access to Marina Walk, and is just minutes from the Metro, Tram, restaurants, cafés, and shops. This is modern waterfront living at its best. 

This one bedroom comes with fitted kitchen appliances, is bright and spacious and it is finished to a very high standard. The apartment has 2 bathrooms, separate laundry area and storage space. There is a balcony from the living room and there are floor to ceiling windows. The apartment is located on a high floor and is overlooking the community. The apartment is vacant and is an ideal option for end users and investors. 

Residents enjoy access to world-class amenities, including two infinity pools, two state-of-the-art gyms, padel and squash courts, basketball/football courts, and the exclusive Amara Lounge. Marina Gate also features the luxurious Jumeirah Living Hotel offering premium services and facilities.

Knight Frank is delighted to introduce this one bedroom sea view apartment on Palm Jumeirah, Dubai. Positioned on a high floor with a full floor availability option, it offers a rare opportunity for both end users and investors seeking scale in one of the city’s most coveted waterfront addresses.

Spanning approx. 99 sq m (1,066 sq ft), the apartment is arranged around an open plan living and dining area with a modern fitted kitchen. A well proportioned bedroom is supported by two bathrooms, creating a practical layout for single or couple living. One parking space completes this freehold coastal home.

Palm Jumeirah remains Dubai’s flagship island community, known for its beachfront hotels, dining destinations and skyline views. Residents benefit from easy access to beach clubs, retail, cafés and leisure, together with convenient road and monorail connections to Dubai Marina, Sheikh Zayed Road and the wider city.

title: THE DORCHESTER COLLECTION | 30/70 PAYMENT PLAN
raw_area: Vela Viento By Omniyat, Business Bay, Dubai
description:
Step into a new dimension of waterfront luxury with this exceptional 2-bedroom + study residence at VELA Viento, Dorchester Collection, located in the heart of Marasi Bay. Developed by OMNIYAT and managed by the world-renowned Dorchester Collection, this project redefines elevated living through design, service, and exclusivity .

Spanning an impressive 3,920 sqft, this residence is designed to maximize space, light, and seamless indoor-outdoor living. The layout features a spacious open-plan living and dining area, complemented by a show kitchen and a separate back-of-house kitchen.

The residence offers two generously sized bedrooms, including a luxurious master suite with a walk-in dressing area and an elegant en-suite bathroom. A dedicated study adds flexibility for a home office or additional private space, while a maid’s room, laundry area, powder room, and private lift lobby enhance both comfort and privacy.

One of the defining features of this home is its expansive wraparound terraces, extending the living space outdoors and offering breathtaking views of the Burj Khalifa and Dubai Canal . These terraces create a perfect setting for entertaining, relaxation, and enjoying Dubai’s skyline in complete privacy.

VELA Viento is designed by Foster + Partners with interiors by Gilles & Boissier, blending architectural excellence with refined Parisian elegance. Residents enjoy a curated lifestyle with world-class amenities and Dorchester Collection’s legendary services, including concierge, valet, and bespoke hospitality offerings .

Located within Marasi Bay, the project connects seamlessly to Downtown Dubai, DIFC, and Dubai Canal, placing residents at the center of a vibrant waterfront destination.

Price: AED 24,700,000
Size: 3,920 sqft
Handover: Q4 2027
Payment Plan: 30/70
Fully Furnished

Interested in this unit or want to learn more? Get in touch today to explore investment opportunities in VELA Viento – Dorchester Collection, Marasi Bay.
